actions.name: ADD_TO_PLAYLIST
actions.description: Add music to a playlist. If the track is not already in the library, the configured music fetch service must resolve it first. Creates the playlist if it does not exist.

actions.name: BLUEBUBBLES_SEND_REACTION
actions.description: Add or remove a reaction on a message via BlueBubbles

actions.name: CHECK_CLOUD_CREDITS
actions.description: Check ElizaCloud credit balance, container costs, and estimated remaining runtime.

actions.name: COMMANDS_LIST
actions.description: List all available commands with their aliases. Only activates for /commands or /cmds slash commands.

actions.name: DELETE_MESSAGE
actions.description: Delete a message from a Discord channel

actions.name: DELETE_PLAYLIST
actions.description: Delete a saved playlist. Works best in DMs to avoid flooding group chats.

exampleCalls.user: Use DELETE_PLAYLIST with the provided parameters.

actions.name: DOWNLOAD_MUSIC
actions.description: Download music to the local library without playing it. Requires the configured music fetch service to resolve the track.

actions.name: EDIT_MESSAGE
actions.description: Edit an existing message in a Discord channel

actions.name: FREEZE_CLOUD_AGENT
actions.description: Freeze a cloud agent: snapshot state, disconnect bridge, stop container.

actions.name: GET_SKILL_DETAILS
actions.description: Get detailed information about a specific skill including version, owner, and stats.

actions.name: GET_SKILL_GUIDANCE
actions.description: Search for and get skill instructions. Use when user asks to find a skill or when you need instructions for a capability.

actions.name: HELP_COMMAND
actions.description: Show available commands and their descriptions. Only activates for /help, /h, or /? slash commands.

actions.name: IMESSAGE_SEND_MESSAGE
actions.description: Send a text message via iMessage (macOS only)

actions.name: INSTALL_SKILL
actions.description: Install a skill from the ClawHub registry. The skill will be security-scanned before activation.

actions.name: LIST_PLAYLISTS
actions.description: List all saved playlists for the user. Works best in DMs to avoid flooding group chats.

exampleCalls.user: Use LIST_PLAYLISTS with the provided parameters.

actions.name: LOAD_PLAYLIST
actions.description: Load a saved playlist and add all tracks to the queue. Works best in DMs to avoid flooding group chats.

exampleCalls.user: Use LOAD_PLAYLIST with the provided parameters.

actions.name: MANAGE_SHOPIFY_CUSTOMERS
actions.description: List and search customers in a connected Shopify store.

actions.name: MANAGE_SHOPIFY_INVENTORY
actions.description: Check inventory levels, adjust stock quantities, and list store locations in Shopify.

actions.name: MANAGE_SHOPIFY_ORDERS
actions.description: List recent orders, check specific order status, and mark orders as fulfilled in Shopify.

actions.name: MANAGE_SHOPIFY_PRODUCTS
actions.description: List, search, create, or update products in a connected Shopify store.

actions.name: MODELS_COMMAND
actions.description: List available AI models and providers. Only activates for /models slash command.

actions.name: PAUSE_MUSIC
actions.description: Pause the currently playing track (hold playback). Use whenever the user asks to pause music or audio.

actions.name: PLAY_AUDIO
actions.description: Start playing a new song: provide a track name, artist, search words, or a media URL.

actions.name: PLAY_MUSIC_QUERY
actions.description: Handle any complex music query that requires understanding and research. Supports: artist queries (first single, latest song, similar artists, popular songs, nth album), temporal (80s, 90s, specific years), genre/mood/vibe, activities (workout, study, party), charts/trending, albums, movie/game/TV soundtracks, lyrics/topics, versions (covers, remixes, acoustic, live), and more. Uses Wikipedia, music databases, and web search to find the right music.

actions.name: PROVISION_CLOUD_AGENT
actions.description: Deploy an ElizaOS agent to ElizaCloud. Provisions a container, waits for deployment, connects the bridge, and starts auto-backup.

actions.name: QUEUE_MUSIC
actions.description: Add a song to the queue for later

exampleCalls.user: Use QUEUE_MUSIC with the provided parameters.

actions.name: RESUME_CLOUD_AGENT
actions.description: Resume a frozen cloud agent from snapshot. Re-provisions, restores state, reconnects bridge.

actions.name: RESUME_MUSIC
actions.description: Resume music after a pause. Use when the user says resume, unpause, or continue.

actions.name: RUN_SKILL_SCRIPT
actions.description: Execute a script bundled with an installed skill. Provide skill slug and script name.

actions.name: SAVE_PLAYLIST
actions.description: Save the current music queue as a playlist for the user. Works best in DMs to avoid flooding group chats.

exampleCalls.user: Use SAVE_PLAYLIST with the provided parameters.

actions.name: SEARCH_SHOPIFY_STORE
actions.description: Search across products, orders, and customers in a connected Shopify store.

actions.name: SEARCH_SKILLS
actions.description: Search the skill registry for available skills by keyword or category.

actions.name: SEARCH_YOUTUBE
actions.description: Search YouTube for a song or video and return the link. Use this when a user asks to find or search for a YouTube video or song without providing a specific URL.

actions.name: SEND_BLUEBUBBLES_MESSAGE
actions.description: Send a message via iMessage through BlueBubbles

actions.name: SETUP_CREDENTIALS
actions.description: Guide the user through setting up API credentials for supported third-party services, validate them when possible, and store them securely.

exampleCalls.user: Use SETUP_CREDENTIALS with the provided parameters.

actions.name: SHOW_QUEUE
actions.description: Show the current music queue

actions.name: SIGNAL_LIST_CONTACTS
actions.description: List Signal contacts

actions.name: SIGNAL_LIST_GROUPS
actions.description: List Signal groups

actions.name: SIGNAL_SEND_MESSAGE
actions.description: Send a message to a Signal contact or group

exampleCalls.user: Use SIGNAL_SEND_MESSAGE with the provided parameters.

actions.name: SIGNAL_SEND_REACTION
actions.description: React to a Signal message with an emoji

exampleCalls.user: Use SIGNAL_SEND_REACTION with the provided parameters.

actions.name: SKIP_TRACK
actions.description: Skip the current track and play the next queued song. Use for skip, next track, or next song.

actions.name: STATUS_COMMAND
actions.description: Show session directive settings via /status slash command. Only activates for /status or /s prefix.

actions.name: STOP_COMMAND
actions.description: Stop current operation or abort running tasks. Triggered by /stop, /abort, or /cancel slash commands only.

actions.name: STOP_MUSIC
actions.description: Stop playback and clear the queue. Use when the user wants music off or the queue cleared.

actions.name: SYNC_SKILL_CATALOG
actions.description: Sync the skill catalog from the registry to discover new skills.

actions.name: TOGGLE_SKILL
actions.description: Enable or disable an installed skill. Say 'enable <skill>' or 'disable <skill>'.

actions.name: UNINSTALL_SKILL
actions.description: Uninstall a non-bundled skill. Bundled skills cannot be removed.
